scope: TileLang recompute P/dP pipeline with correctness-preserving actual-LI panel overflow spill

code.change: Allow --spill-overflow for final-dKV math modes and add the existing panel-MFMA spill kernel into the recompute_pdp_store_then_dkv_limited producer path before returning final dKV.
code.read: This closes the prior caveat where split-panel topk512 recompute runs silently dropped overflow pairs.

s512.read: Correctness passes in the same BF16 recompute band as prior P/dP recompute gates while including overflow pairs.

comparison.read: The explicit topk512 split-panel recompute pipeline is only faster when it drops 333843 overflow pairs. Making it correctness-preserving raises it to 19.85 ms, worse than both the full no-overflow padded-panel run and the sparse-atomic wall.

decision.reason: Capacity-limited actual-LI panels plus a separate spill kernel are not a speed path for recompute P/dP+dKV. The spill stage is too large, and the combined path remains above target.
decision.next: Do not chase capacity-limited split panels unless overflow is fused into the main producer or the route is prepacked into a true sparse segmented reducer. Continue toward a smaller keyed/segmented in-producer reducer or HIP/CK/rocWMMA implementation.
